layout.style: Strict left-alignment. IDE-feel with vertical rules (border-l border-zinc-800) for timeline and nested items.

buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors

cards.style: Flat background (bg-zinc-900/50), 1px solid border (border-zinc-800). No soft shadows. Sharp corners or rounded-md max.
cards.hover: Hover effects should slightly lighten the border (hover:border-zinc-700) or add an emerald glow.

code_block.style: bg-black border border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-4 sm:p-6 overflow-x-auto font-mono text-sm leading-relaxed

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-mono border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-300

tabs.style: Shadcn tabs customized. bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 data-[state=active]:bg-zinc-800 data-[state=active]:text-white

images.description: Abstract futuristic eye with complex network patterns - use at low opacity (e.g. 10-20%) blending into the dark background.
Developer portrait male dark - to be used in an avatar or about me section if needed. Grayscale filter recommended.
Data analytics dashboard for AI-Powered Sports Talent Assessment Platform.
Digital interface showcasing futuristic graphs for LLM-Powered Natural Language to SQL Engine.
Graphical user interface for RAG-Powered Developer Documentation Assistant.

animations.entrance: Use Framer Motion to fade in and slide up slightly (y: 20) on scroll.
animations.code_typing: Optional typewriter effect for hero python class.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. text-zinc-400 on bg-zinc-950 is ~4.5:1, text-white is over 15:1.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='explore-projects-btn', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap animations in respects prefers-reduced-motion media query.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: JetBrains Mono and IBM Plex Sans.
Use Shadcn UI for Tabs, Form, Input, Textarea, Button, Badge, and Card.
Style the hero section snippet like a real code editor: line numbers on the left, syntax highlighting colors as specified in components.code_block.
Maintain strict left alignment for content, leveraging a timeline vertical border for the Experience section.
Do NOT use pure gradients or purple/teal. Stick to the zinc/emerald/white palette.
Ensure the contact form posts to the backend and stores in MongoDB as per user instructions.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, inputs, and tab triggers.
